gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.TG >= 200 AND STRFTIME('%Y', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) - STRFTIME('%Y', T1.Birthday) > 50
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID)
FROM Laboratory AS T1
JOIN Patient AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE T1.TG >= 200
AND CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', 'now') AS INTEGER) - CAST(STRFTIME('%Y', T2.Birthday) AS INTEGER) > 50
question: For all patients with triglyceride (TG) level beyond the normal range, how many are age more than 50 years?
